HomePage.title: வணக்கம் உலகம்
HomePage.heroSlogan: Stories that shape wisdom, voices that spark change.
HomePage.heroDescription: Veliyam is where timeless Tamil thought meets global ideas. Explore blogs that blend culture, creativity, and technology into narratives worth sharing.
HomePage.heroCTAcontent: Ready to discover insights that matter? Click below and begin your journey…
HomePage.faq1Question: What kind of blogs does Veliyam publish?
HomePage.faq1Answer: Veliyam focuses on culture, creativity, technology, and storytelling — blending Tamil wisdom with global perspectives.
HomePage.faq2Answer: Yes. Our blogs are designed with multilingual support so readers can enjoy content in Tamil, English, and other languages.
HomePage.faq3Answer: Absolutely. We welcome guest writers and collaborators who share our vision of meaningful storytelling.
HomePage.bottomCTAcontent: Don’t just read — experience. Veliyam is more than blogs; it’s a journey into ideas. Click explore and see where wisdom meets creativity.
